consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Swedish Oat Fiber AB' in certificate matches issuer company name in invoice text and address block; country 'Sweden' matches exactly after normalization. No conflicting information found. (Rules 4.1.0, 4.1.3.1, 4.1.4)

consignee.certificate_value: Tianjin Yujiu International Trade Co., Ltd
consignee.invoice_value: Tianjin Yujiu International Trade Co., Ltd
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'Tianjin Yujiu International Trade Co., Ltd' in certificate matches 'Ship To' and delivery address fields in invoice explicitly; country 'China' matches exactly. Invoice contains a clear invoicing party different from consignee, but consignee is clearly identified in delivery address consistent with certificate. (Rules 4.2.0.2, 4.2.2.1, 4.1.4)

goods_description.certificate_value:
300 x 18 kg paperbags
OatWell Bran BG22 OI012B22
goods_description.invoice_value: OATWELL® Bran BG22 - paper bag OI012B22
goods_description.motivation: Article number 'OI012B22' in certificate matches exactly article number in invoice after normalization; product name 'OatWell Bran BG22' matches with allowance for trademarks and formatting. (Rule 4.3.2)

quantity.motivation: Net weight '5400 kg' in certificate matches numerically '5400.0000 Kg' in invoice within allowed decimal normalization; unit consistent and weight category inferred from context. (Rule 4.4.3.1)

origin.motivation: Origin 'Sweden' in certificate explicitly stated as 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN SWEDEN' in invoice; normalization allows exact match. No additional conflicting origin information present. (Rules 4.5.4.1, 4.5.4.2)

overall_assessment.decision_summary: Alla kontrollpunkter (avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprung) matchar helt mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Inga avvikelser eller oklarheter noterades. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer och dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
